name: error-sound
description: Plays a sound when i mess up.

errorSound.enabled.description: Enable or disable the mistake maker.

errorSound.playForWarnings.description: Play a gentle sound for warnings (yellow squigglies), not just errors.

errorSound.cooldown.description: Seconds to wait before playing again.

errorSound.soundSelection.description: Choose a built-in sound, or select 'Custom' to use your own file.

errorSound.customSoundPath.description: If 'Custom' is selected above, paste the absolute path to your .mp3 or .wav here.

errorSound.messageSelection.description: Choose the pop-up text, select 'Custom' to write your own, or 'None' to disable.

errorSound.customMessageText.description: If 'Custom' is selected above, type your personalized error message here.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
